hero.title: Unforgettable Kenya Safaris with Expert-Crafted Itineraries
hero.description: Explore our curated safari packages featuring the Big 5, the Great Migration, and Kenya's most iconic destinations. Every detail planned, so you can focus on the adventure.

whyUs.title: We handle the logistics, you enjoy the adventure
whyUs.description: From the moment you book to the day you return home, we've got every detail covered.
whyUs.item1Desc: Know exactly what to expect each day of your safari adventure.
whyUs.item2Desc: Experienced driver-guides who know Kenya's parks inside out.
whyUs.item3Desc: Handpicked accommodations from budget-friendly to luxury.
whyUs.item4Desc: WhatsApp support before and throughout your trip.

masai-mara-lake-nakuru-6-day.title: 6 Days - Masai Mara and Lake Nakuru
masai-mara-lake-nakuru-6-day.tagline: Big 5 wildlife and the incredible wildebeest migration
masai-mara-lake-nakuru-6-day.description: Kickstart a thrilling 6-day adventure through Kenya, starting and ending in Nairobi. Your journey begins in Masai Mara, famous for its Big 5 animals. You'll see at least 4 of these amazing creatures and witness the incredible wildebeest migration if you're there at the right time of year. Next, head to Lake Nakuru, just a 5-hour scenic drive away, to spot rhinos and enjoy birdwatching.

ol-pejeta-lake-naivasha-4-day.title: 4 Days - Ol Pejeta and Lake Naivasha
ol-pejeta-lake-naivasha-4-day.tagline: Big Five viewing and scenic lake activities
ol-pejeta-lake-naivasha-4-day.description: In this itinerary you will be visiting Ol Pejeta Conservancy and Lake Naivasha. Ol Pejeta is home to 'Big Five' animals whereas Lake Naivasha is a beautiful freshwater lake offering unique activities like boat rides and hiking. Walk alongside giraffes, buffaloes, and gazelles on Crescent Island.

kenya-grand-tour-11-day.title: 11 Days - Grand Kenya Safari
kenya-grand-tour-11-day.tagline: The ultimate Kenya safari covering 6 iconic destinations
kenya-grand-tour-11-day.description: Cover the 6 most popular destinations in Kenya, combining northern and southern parks - Samburu Reserve, Ol Pejeta Conservancy, Lake Nakuru, Masai Mara, Lake Naivasha & Amboseli. With our experienced driver guides, it will be a trip of a lifetime!

masai-mara-fly-in-4-day.title: 4 Days (Fly-in) - Masai Mara
masai-mara-fly-in-4-day.tagline: Immersive fly-in safari without the long drives
masai-mara-fly-in-4-day.description: This fly-in tour of Masai Mara offers an immersive wildlife experience with round-trip flights. Witness the Big 5 and, during the season, the iconic Wildebeest Migration. Perfect for those seeking an unforgettable safari getaway without the long drives.

ol-pejeta-nakuru-naivasha-mara-7-day.title: 7 Days - Central Kenya Safari
ol-pejeta-nakuru-naivasha-mara-7-day.tagline: The 4 most popular destinations in Kenya
ol-pejeta-nakuru-naivasha-mara-7-day.description: Cover the 4 most popular destinations in Kenya - Ol Pejeta Conservancy, Lake Nakuru, Lake Naivasha & Masai Mara. Tour starts and ends in Nairobi. With our experienced driver guides, it will be a trip of a lifetime!
